scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:pwa
scripts.verify:vercel: node scripts/validate-env.mjs admin-panel --env-file .vercel/.env.production.local && node scripts/validate-env.mjs team-member-pwa --env-file .vercel/.env.production.local && node scripts/validate-env.mjs backend --env-file .vercel/.env.production.local && vercel build --prod
scripts.deploy:vercel:prod: npm run vercel:pull:prod && npm run verify:vercel && vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod
